Document:
# Vulpkanin
[bold]Vulpkanin[/bold] are an [bold][color=#4df]Oxygen-breathing[/color][/bold], [bold][color=#ff0]Sulfur-blooded[/color][/bold] species; with features approximating vulpines (foxes), canines (dogs), and similar insapient animals.
Their weirdly shaped muzzle leads to [bold]difficulties drinking[/bold], making them sometimes spill a little bit of what they're drinking on the ground.
Vulpkanin can [bold]leap[/bold] a short distance on the ground, quickly moving them forward, but running into obstacles or walls will make them [bold]trip and fall[/bold]!
Vulpkanin have the baseline body temperature of [bold][color=yellow]37°C[/color][/bold] (~[color=yellow]310°K[/color]). They experience the effects of [bold]hypothermia at [color=#4df]-43°C[/color][/bold] and [bold]hyperthermia at [color=#f44]47°C[/color][/bold]. (~[color=#4df]230°K[/color] & [color=#f44]320°K[/color])
Vulpkanin are [bold]obligate carnivores[/bold], meaning they must eat [bold]meat-based foods[/bold], and [bold]can't stomach vegetarian meals[/bold], however they can [bold]safely digest raw meat and blood[/bold].
Their bodies can process [bold]2 reagents[/bold] at a time.
They slowly [bold]passively regenerate[/bold] all types of [bold][color=yellow]Brute[/color] damage[/bold], and individually [bold][color=#f44]Heat[/color] damage[/bold].
Vulpkanin names typically follow a "Firstname Lastname" pattern, frequenting tap [color=#999](/t, d/)[/color] and trill [color=#999](/r/)[/color] sounds.
